name: axel
title: axel
description:
light command line download accelerator
Axel tries to accelerate the downloading process by using multiple
connections for one file, similar to DownThemAll and other famous
programs. It can also use multiple mirrors for one download.
.
Using Axel, you will get files faster from Internet. So, Axel can
speed up a download up to 60% (approximately, according to some tests).
.
Axel supports HTTP, HTTPS, FTP and FTPS protocols.
.
Axel tries to be as light as possible, so it might be useful as a
wget clone (and other console based programs) on byte-critical systems.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use axel because light command line download accelerator.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use axel as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `axel [OPTIONS] url1 [url2] [url...]` as documented upstream for axel.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `axel $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL` as documented upstream for axel.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `axel ftp://ftp.nl.kernel.org/pub/linux/kernel/v2.2/linux-2.2.20.tar.bz2` as documented upstream for axel.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `axel ftp://ftp.{be,nl,uk,de}.kernel.org/pub/linux/kernel/v2.4/linux-2.4.17.tar.bz2` as documented upstream for axel.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair axel with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `axel --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: axel - light command line download accelerator
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install axel. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `axel [OPTIONS] url1 [url2] [url...]`. Further invocations from upstream: `axel $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL`; `axel ftp://ftp.nl.kernel.org/pub/linux/kernel/v2.2/linux-2.2.20.tar.bz2`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: light command line download accelerator.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: axel - light command line download accelerator.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install axel
